c.d: The number of active users on the platform. A larger user base increases the chances of selling items quickly.
The costs associated with listing and selling items, including listing fees, commission fees, and transaction fees. Lower fees increase profitability.
How simple the app is to use, including listing creation, navigation, and communication with buyers. An intuitive interface saves time and effort.
The availability of integrated shipping labels, discounted shipping rates, and options for local pickup or delivery. Convenient shipping options attract more buyers.
The app's specialization in specific product categories, such as fashion, electronics, or handmade goods. A focused category can attract a more targeted audience.
